    @allure.title("GET /api/v1/dictionary/region/?country=15 - unauthorized returns 401")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    def test_get_region_list_unauthorized(self):
        """
        Purpose: Verify that request without token returns 401 Unauthorized
        """
        with allure.step("Send GET request without auth token"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/dictionary/region/"
            response = requests.get(url, params={"country": COUNTRY_ID})
    
        with allure.step("Verify status code is 401"):
